top_signals.title: Pakistan Plans to Boost LPG Imports and Mulls Cheaper Oil Supply from Iran
top_signals.summary: Pakistan will raise its imports of liquefied petroleum gas (LPG) from Iran and considers the idea of importing cheaper crude oil from the Islamic Republic, Pakistani Minister of Petroleum, Ali Pervaiz Malik, has said. Pakistan, which is a key mediator in the U.S.-Iran negotiations, has kept close relations with Iran throughout the latest Middle East crisis, and has relied on negotiating directly with Iran safe passage of LNG carriers from Qatar bound for Pakistan during the crisis. Now that the U.S. has waived the sanctions on Iranian petroleum…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: US posts $10 million reward over Russian cyber campaign targeting Signal, WhatsApp
top_signals.summary: Russia-linked hacking groups tracked as UNC5792 and UNC4221 have socially engineered their way into the messaging accounts of government officials.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Yen Hits 40-Year Low in Historic Slide That’s Rattled Japan
top_signals.summary: The yen slid to its weakest level against the dollar since 1986, a milestone that will generate unease in Japan and put traders on high alert for authorities wading into the market.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Government vows to fight suit on bail denials for Ohkawara adviser
top_signals.summary: The state called for the suit filed by three family members of Shizuo Aishima, who died in 2021 at age 72, to be dismissed.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Strategy opens door to selling billions of bitcoin under new capital plan. Here's what it means
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: White House to speak with law enforcement groups to push Crypto's Clarity Act
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Minutes of the Meeting of the Court of Directors held on 23 April 2026
top_signals.summary: The Bank's Court of Directors acts as a unitary board, setting the organisation's strategy and budget and taking key decisions on resourcing and appointments. Required to meet a minimum seven times per year, it has five executive members from the Bank and up to nine non-executive members.

top_signals.title: Modernising money and markets − speech by Sarah Breeden
Schneider announces additional leadership changes
top_signals.summary:
Schneider National announced additional leadership changes and promotions on Monday as part of a previously announced succession plan.

The post Schneider announces additional leadership changes appeared first on FreightWaves.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Kalshi traders expect this week's jobs report will disappoint Wall Street outlook
top_signals.summary: The Dow Jones expects over 118,000 jobs will be added, but Kalshi traders give under 60% that over 100,000 jobs will be added.

top_signals.title: Sweden grants 25-year concession to heavy rare earth deposit
top_signals.summary: The Norra Kärr project is said to have the capacity to supply all of Europe's annual dysprosium requirements.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
